title: Hiring an Expert to integrate Monday.com with Woocommerce
excerpt: We were recently informed from Monday that Monday.com and Woocommerce integration is no longer available.  The integration quit working this morning around 7:30am and due to this news - we aren’t able to get this fixed i…

posts.author: thepremierhorse (The Premier Horse)
posts.cookedHtml:
We were recently informed from Monday that Monday.com and Woocommerce integration is no longer available. The integration quit working this morning around 7:30am and due to this news - we aren’t able to get this fixed inside Monday.

We need to hire someone quickly to integrate these two platforms possibly using Zapier. Our entire order management system runs off this integration so this is high priority for our team.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thepremierhorse - that is unfortunate to hear. WooCommerce modules are available in both Make (formally Integromat) and Zapier, so you do have options as both these engines integrate very well with monday.

We would be happy to learn a little more about how you had monday integrated previously and deliver a solution that meets your needs.

If you’d like to discuss further feel free to DM me here, or shoot me a message at info@greenllamas.com. Additionally, check us out online to learn more about what we do.

Thanks.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thepremierhorse

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to contact me directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m sorry to hear you’ve lost access to something so vital, so suddenly, @thepremierhorse. Normally I would say Polished Geek would be an excellent monday․com partner to assist you, as we have years of custom eCommerce development experience from our pre-monday partnership days. But if this is urgent and a short waitlist to kickoff would be a problem, then be sure to talk to @mark.anley at Green Llamas. Mark and his team can definitely assist you with this type of work.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek

posts.cookedHtml:

We appreciate your outreach and thank you for your time!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thepremierhorse

Welcome to the monday community!

First of all, I would like to say that you don’t have to fret over the news anymore. Since monday dot com and Woocommerce integration is no longer available and you are looking to integrate both the platforms via Zapier, I would recommend you seek help from certified professionals having strong prowess in monday.com integrations. When you connect with seasoned professionals, they will help you automate workflows across 5,000+ apps.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
